title: Wilhelm Six-Line Phase Ladder
next_target: Phase 3 v6: Latest Phase Source Synchronization and Lean/Lake Execution Prep

gates.claim: Wilhelm line dynamics normalizes to 64 carriers x 6 selected-line events
gates.falsifier: directed event count not equal to 384 under six-line carrier x selected-line normalization

gates.claim: Every selected-line event flips exactly one retained line
gates.falsifier: any event changes zero or more than one retained line under convention

gates.claim: Line mutation is locally reversible by the same selected-line action
gates.falsifier: flip selected line twice does not return source

gates.claim: Carrier alone does not determine next transition
gates.metric: carriers with multiple targets under selected lines
gates.falsifier: carrier-only projection determines target for every selected line

gates.claim: Selected line alone does not determine next transition
gates.falsifier: line-only projection determines target independent of carrier

gates.claim: Line labels are not freely permutable without changing transitions
gates.metric: minimum changed transitions for nonidentity line permutation
gates.falsifier: nonidentity line permutation preserves all 384 transitions

gates.claim: Line-position semantic maxima are not flat across six lines
gates.metric: category maxima occupy multiple line positions
gates.falsifier: category maxima collapse to one line or uniform profile
full corpus shows boundary_excess and carry_lift_rechart not concentrated at line 6

closed_claims: Wilhelm is a retained six-line carrier plus selected-line event automaton.
The transition graph is Q6: 64 states, 384 directed single-line events, 192 undirected edges.
Carrier-only, line-only, semantic-role-only, ordinal/name-only projections are not state-complete for transition custody.
Line-position semantics form a non-flat ladder, with line 6 carrying upper excess/completion/carry pressure.
open_target: Find or derive the explicit post-line-6 lift/re-chart rule connecting Wilhelm upper-excess pressure to a new retained carrier domain.
Run full source-string semantic reparse if raw Wilhelm translation JS is available, replacing extracted summary profiles with regenerated line-text flags.
falsification_targets: A full Wilhelm source extraction where selected-line event count differs from 64x6.
A line event that cannot be represented as a single retained-line flip under the declared line-order convention.
A projection using ordinal/name/text/category alone that determines all 384 next transitions.
A nonidentity line permutation preserving all 384 transitions.
A full semantic reparse where line-position category profile is flat and line 6 does not carry excess/completion pressure.
